title: Read book — pre-SAT self-curriculum to-do
html:
TL;DR

  • Late-July 2020 self-syllabus: order book, read book, SAT register + prep, Young Leaders in Action, alumni of top schools, get in contact with Sorenson, get in contact with Jann, get in contact with Brenda, get an internship, start python, Write Goals!!!!!!
  • Rare all-fronts-at-once note: SAT (academic), Young Leaders in Action (extracurricular), top-school-alumni outreach (network), Sorenson/Jann/Brenda (mentor pipeline), python + e-commerce (skills), internship (resume), goals (meta).
  • One of the first vault references to Sorenson — yet-unidentified mentor or program contact in the Ford-orbit pre-application infrastructure.
  • The "please do e-commerce, if there's a will there is a way" line is bare self-coaching mid-pandemic — same register as 2020 06 29 freedoms vs pleasures.
  • This note is one of the load-bearing third-mention triggers that promotes Jann from name-drop to dedicated entity in this ingest sweep.

Source quote

"-please do e-commerce, if theirs a will there is a way"

"-young leaders in action / -alumni of top schools / -get in contact with Sorenson / -get in contact with Jann / -get in contact with Brenda / -get an internship / -start python / Write Goals!!!!!!"

Open questions

  • Who is Sorenson? Mentor, scholarship contact, or a specific program (Sorenson Scholarship)?
  • Young Leaders in Action — was this a formal program Yahir entered, or an aspirational tag?
  • Did the python course actually start in 2020 or did it slip until the recurring 2021 "start python course" reminders (2021 05 16 osu housing owen, 2021 07 28 vegetarian drive todos)?

Wikilinks

jann · brenda aguilera · ford family foundation · fbla · fear of not doing · learn to run before flying · osu
